review_title: Great Customer Service and a Product that works and delivers.
description: Very impressed with how helpful and knowledgeable customer service is and yes, you don't need to deal with AI which guesses the answer and tells you think that aren't currently possible with the program. Also the program works so that's really something.
author: Charles A.
pros: The staff were very helpful. Customer support really knows about this product and can really help you. Something which at one stage was expected in life is now a rarity so when you find it. It holds value. Also, Instapage is fast, A/B testing, etc
cons: It's good for basics, but when bringing in extra code from elsewhere because of the way it loads it gets a bit more complicated. Then again, if the focus is build something within Instapage as that's what it's designed for, you will get good results and this software won't let you down.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: BEST no-code landing page builder
author: Erin H.
pros: I love Instapages landing page builder -- it's so easy to use with great templates, which results in sleek, professional looking pages that are mobile-optimised and fast -- perfect for conversions. I also really appreciated the support available in Instapages (THANK YOU!) - any time I have an issue I open the chat widget and a real person is chatting and helping me with screenshots and videos and the like, it's really amazing. They even did that when I was on a free trial and not a guaranteed paying customer yet. Lastly, I love the ability to create custom forms quickly and set up Google Tag Manager to track form submissions. Overall I think Instapage is great for conversion rate optimisation and digital campaigns.
cons: Unfortunately as a sole trader it is a little pricey for me - especially as the entry tier only includes 2 subdomains, which limits me to using it with 2 customers only.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nice software, awful team
description: Vey bad. I started paying 25 dollar a month and I ended up paying 250 dollar a month, without any new features. They just increased the price. Fortunately I left them and moved to Landingi.
author: Valerio Q.
pros: It is very functional and easy to use. Many templates and features.
cons: The price change every 2 months, generally it increases without adding any new feature. The team is not reliable at all. I don't trust them anymore.

review_title: Instapage Rocks!
description: My overall experience with Instapage has been great! In my opinion, it's one of the best platforms for growth marketing, a/b testing, etc. Super easy to work with and the customer support is superb!
author: Adrian P.
pros: Easy to use and really great customer support. They have never let me down and I can connect with a human no problem.
cons: The steep price increase for global forms. Unfortunately, an changes made to a form will create a duplicate in your assets folder. Basically, it duplicates every form. This is a big headache when it comes to working with teams if you have a client or work for a place that doesn't want to pay for the global forms upgrade.

review_title: A Partner for Convertible
description: We've been using Instapage for almost 5 years now. We are happy about how it's growing, and allow us to have more control of our marketing campaigns for our clientes.
author: Francisco C.
pros: Great software. We select a SaaS based in several conditions, but Ease and Integrations are on the top. Instapage is a five star software in both, and the Live Chat for support is always super helpful
cons: Not all my team speaks english. Sometimes we need Spanish support, and it's almost never available. Also, the production team in Instapage is a little slow to solve our development needs.

review_title: Best drag and drop customizable landing page builder ever
description: Excellent customer service (they always help when needed) and I also love the perk of A/B testing my landing pages to make sure they convert higher. I use Instapage for everything, it's a critical part of how I run my business.
author: Stephanie M.
pros: The reason I use Instagram as opposed to other landing page software from my other software providers (like Kajabi) is that Instagram is completely customizable. Anything I want to create, is possible. I don't enjoy other landing page builders that limit you with tricky to change templates.
cons: The cost is quite high, more than I wanted to spend. That said, it has paid for itself so many times over again.

review_title: Very Good but Expensive
description: All Good for me
author: Elmail C.
pros: The editor tool is the easiest to use when compared to other tools.
cons: Expensive compared to other tools with the same feature
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Finding the Right Sales Page Generator Takes Time
description: Powerful- really powerful lead capture and converter. It takes a little to understand and use. Really beautiful reusable templates and pages once they are built.
author: tanya G.
pros: Personalization! This platform gets it. Not all subscribers, customers, or first-time buyers are going to respond to the same ad. The sophistication of Instapage is amazing. I mean heat maps and mouse movement? It is like you are standing behind the potential client witnessing what they are actually responding too. Simply amazing!
cons: Instapage does connect with email systems like Convert Kit and other big email platforms. Yay- boo! Now it is one more software to learn and manage. Any more I am looking for a one-stop-shop type platform. Is there any place to get everything all bundled together?
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great software but the price is too high
description: Great software that is probably the best in terms of features, ease of use and looks but for half the price you can get a product very close to it, and for me it was a deal-breaker and also for many of my clients.
author: Shay H.
pros: Easy integration Great editor A lot of templates Good support
cons: Too expensive and prices go up every year The Mobile version is ok but not perfect for mobile phones

review_title: Very pleased with Instapage for several years.
description: Fantastic. Would highly recommend to anyone responsible for the creation and ongoing maintenance of landing page at scale.
author: Mike V.
pros: The customer support is unmatched. Hands down the best i've ever experienced and they take feedback seriously.
cons: There are limitations to new features that you have to wait for sometimes but that is the case with any service.

review_title: Instapage : Create landing pages in an instant!
description: Overall, Instapage has been a breeze to work with. It has numerous features which are extremely helpful to every type of user, and the multiple integrations provide a big bonus.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Ease of use 2. Amazing integrations 3. AI Content creation helps cut down a lot of time 4. The AdMap feature is a big plus which help you see a clear view of your ad topics, ad campaigns etc.
cons: It's a bit pricey than the other products on the market.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Instapage review
author: Ayesha S.
pros: I adored the freedom the developer gave us, but how brilliantly we could apply specific components across all presentation pages.
cons: There was a period during which a few highlights were a piece buggy - like the text style would change naturally, without an explanation, when we were composing on the page. Or then again there were a few senseless impediments while setting pictures at the edges of the strip, yet other than that we generally had a great deal of adaptability

review_title: Instapage Review
author: Anna E.
pros: Love the ability to collaborate with clients on page edits. Easy to pull data & review leads. Customer service is always SO helpful.
cons: I feel there could be more features available for more experienced users.

review_title: InstaPage is easy to get started and loved by marketers
description: The software works well and is reliable. The marketing team loves it. The price is on the higher end but it's the type of product that you don't have to think too much about once you've purchased it.
author: Charles D.
pros: It's quick to set up, adding domains and sites is quick and painless, it is generally loved by the marketers
cons: The billing process is difficult and doesn't work well with bursty traffic. Best to start off with a sales rep to explore all options

review_title: Instapage offers excellent customer service.
description: It is assisting us in mass producing landing pages and speeding up client turnaround times. It has served as the centrepiece of each of our Google ad campaigns and has aided in raising client conversion rates.
author: Madhusudan S.
pros: Anyone may now easily create landing pages thanks to Instapage. Everyone on our team, from novices to experts, has been able to create beautiful pages that convert well and generate a high return on investment. Instapage's usability is straightforward, works well for the most fundamental requirements, and enables us to design pages according to our needs.
cons: On the platform itself, the conversion tracking is not very analytical. Also inaccurate, or at least quite perplexing, are the "links on page." Another issue is that it would be fantastic if we could overlay text on top of images in terms of image features.

review_title: Great tool for getting A/B LP Testing off the ground
description: Overall, I have enjoyed working with folks at Instapage and using the tool. I recommend it for companies earlier in their landing page testing process for ease of use and scale.
author: Leah L.
pros: I love how many tests I can run at a time and how seamlessly those tests can run for the user. I like how easy it is to learn Instapage and the ready-made assets are really helpful. Once you get the hand of what you want or don't want on your landing page, the global or personal blocks can be really useful for saving time.
cons: There are some limitations around audience targeting and device targeting which limit how far we can push our a/b testing.

review_title: Instapage & The Instapage Staff Are Amazing!
description: I want to take a moment and give credit where credit is due. First off, instapage is one of the most incredible marketing tools I have ever come across. The simplicity with which you can create dynamic looking pages is so refreshing. I am not a programmer, so ease of use is something I am always looking for when I am looking for marketing tools, but it goes beyond that, the staff at Instapage are the most helpful group of individuals I have ever seen. They are courteous, knowledgeable and extremely prompt, and they see to it that you are completely satisfied and achieve the result you are looking for. My hat is off to everyone at Instapage, thank you so much for making marketing fun and exciting again! Sincerely, Eddie Bonuchi
author: Eddie B.
pros: Everything about Instapage is amazing, but the two things that stand out the most to me are the ease of use, and the support from the Instapage staff. I have never seen such incredible support from a company before. Thank you!
cons: I really don't have anything that I do not like about Instapage. It offers literally everything I am looking for in a marketing tool.

review_title: InstaPage got too greedy and may be conducting bad business practice
description: Be carefull with their business practice. Our plan price would increase about 300%+ for a bunch of features our team would not use. Contacted support to be able to get a more reasonable plan, which they refused telling us that we should use the new features. Contacted then again to be able to get a .html export of our designs to be able to move on to another provider, and they told us that was not possible. Contacted support a 3rd time explaining the sutiation telling then that we like Instapage but at current price (for features we do not use) was too expensive, so we could agree on some terms (for a 5+ years custumer), or at least, give the .html export of our pages so we could move on. They replied: That's not possible. You either pay up 3 times more or leave with nothing. Our team had to re-do hundreds of pages.
author: Gustavo M.
pros: Easy to use. Being able to quickly deploy the the cloud.
cons: Landing pages are slow (Google Ads constantly alerts about this issue). Once you develop all the pages on their plataform they have you locked in. Won't give you a HTML export of your landing pages. You either suck it up and pay more or have to clone all the landing pages on another software. Expensive.

review_title: Easiest landing page builder
author: Daniel T.
pros: Instapage is probably the easiest landing page builder that i have used. I have probably used and tried 4 landing page builder in WordPress and another 3 standalone SAAS landing page builder and this is the easiest to use. It has a drag and drop system and quite a number of integrations.
cons: Instapage is very pricy now in my opinion (used to be cheaper) and recently there are not many updates to the builder.

review_title: Best way to create landing pages that convert
description: Instapage is the best solution I know to create great landing pages that convert in few minutes and withouth knowing to code. We use it in endado.com to recieve the traffic generated by google adwords.
author: Val M.
pros: easy to use, good templates
cons: Sometimes its difficult to do some things because constraints.

review_title: Review From Experienced Landing Page Builder Software User
description: I have used quite a number of landing page builder software, and Instapage is the best out of all of them. Instapage is what I recommend to clients who are just starting out with online marketing and need landing pages, and it's what I use myself. I enjoy using it to create landing pages for my clients. Actually, after using some of the other software out there, I found Instapage to be an absolute breeze to use. Their templates are modern and effective and it's easy to use the software. The only problem is that on the lower packages, you don't get great support options, so if you have an issue, you need to find a solution yourself or submit a ticket which may take a while to be resolved, because there is no live chat.
author: Claire C.
pros: Best pricing. So easy to use. Beautiful templates. You can have a landing page up and running very fast.
cons: Lack of immediate support for lower packages.

review_title: Simple, easy to use landing page software
description: A/B split testing
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I've been using Instapage for a few years and love it's ease of use and mobile friendly options. I have close to a hundred landing pages I'm able to split test and receive leads into my CRM.
cons: I originally chose Instapage for their affordability as there are many landing page options on the market. I've been a customer since 2015 have been downgraded once and was recently told I'd be downgraded to a lesser version. While I love the software in the current option I'm on, It's not worth the price to upgrade.

review_title: Instapage
author: Akanksha G.
pros: -Easy to use -Drag and drop builder. -It is a very good testing tool. -The new instablocks are very efficient.
cons: -Pricing can be better. -Difficult to use custom code.

review_title: Landing Page for Conversions
description: We've integrated Instapge into one of our clients' website. The domain connection was simple enough, but what truly amazed us were the conversion results. Because we weren't held up by notions of what a page in the website should be, we were free to create a page aimed at getting leads. And coupled with Google Ads, we got them!
author: Sorin A.
pros: While the builder itself is top notch, the templates and integration with existing websites are what sold us on the product. Instapage makes it easy to create conversion-focused landing pages - in less than half the time it would take a designer+developer.
cons: The interface is definitely intuitive, but it does get frustrating/confusing due to its internal mechanisms. For example, some elements need to be moved a certain way. Or images need to be inserted through a specific method. It's a bit of a learning curve and even then - not the best overall experience building landing pages.

review_title: Great landing page creator that is easy to use and versatile.
description: I'm able to create custom landing pages for over two dozen of our clients. I'm able to manage and edit all of them easily, and duplicate them as I create similar landing pages. This saves me hours of tedious work and frustration.
author: Garret W.
pros: I love that I'm able to create custom landing pages for all of my clients under one roof, for under minimum amount
cons: The pop-up boxes don't look very professional. If there was a way to better customize them, I think it would help my conversion rates.
